title: Support subcolumns in projections.
description:
Allow storing subcolumns in the projection.
```
CREATE TABLE test_json (ts DateTime64(3), document JSON(id UInt64,name String, age UInt8)) engine = MergeTree() order by toStartOfHour(ts);
alter table test_json add projection prj_v1 (SELECT document.name, document.id order by document.id);
Code: 48. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Projections cannot contain individual subcolumns: document.name. (NOT_IMPLEMENTED)
```
[Fiddle](https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/f7c779cc-23b6-4c62-8db8-8d1de939139b).
Note: it's possible to use `getSubcolumn`, but the projection stores the full JSON anyway.
poc: CREATE TABLE test_json (ts DateTime64(3), document JSON(id UInt64,name String, age UInt8)) engine = MergeTree() order by toStartOfHour(ts);
alter table test_json add projection prj_v1 (SELECT document.name, document.id order by document.id);
key_bug_features: Projections cannot contain individual subcolumns in ClickHouse
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json (ts DateTime64(3), document JSON(id UInt64, name String, age UInt8)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY toStartOfHour(ts);
ALTER TABLE test_json ADD PROJECTION prj_v1 (SELECT document.name, document.id ORDER BY document.id);
SELECT document.name, document.age FROM test_json WHERE document.age IS NOT NULL;
